results.rendered_html:
nir-√vac (aor. -avocat,  AV. ;  ŚBr. ; but mostly used in Pass. -ucyate, -ucyamāna; cf. nir-ukta),
to speak out, express clearly or distinctly, declare, interpret, explain,  Br. ;  Mn. ;  MBh.  &c.;
to derive from (abl.),  Hariv. ;
to order off, warn off, drive away, tell any one to go away from (abl.),  AV.

results.rendered_html:
nirvac 2 P.
1 To interpret, explain; vedā nirvaktumakṣamāḥ.
2 To derive, trace to its etymology (as a word).
3 To relate, tell, declare, announce.
4 To name, call.
